name: Vietnam Marvelous Budget Adventure: Group Tour 10 days
duration: Places:Hanoi - Ninh Binh - Halong Bay - Da Nang - Hoi An - Ho Chi Minh City - Mekong Delta
highlights: Explore the marvelous Tam Coc on a relaxing boat ride
Cruise in the magnificent landscape of Wonder of the World Halong Bay
Unwind in the tranquil ambiance of the stunning Hoi An & Hue
Immerse in the colorful lifestyle of Ho Chi Minh City and the Mekong Delta

itinerary.title: Hanoi Arrival
itinerary.description: Arrive at Noi Bai International Airport. Transfer directly to your hotel in Hanoi, and have a good rest after the long flight to prepare for the exciting journey ahead. You can explore the pretty Hanoi Capital for the rest of the day. Let’s visit famous attractions of this city, such as The Temple of Literature, West Lake, One Pillar Pagoda, and more. NOTE: The check-in time is 14:00

itinerary.title: Ninh Binh Day trip - Hoa Lu - Tam Coc - Mua Cave
itinerary.description:
Morning

From 07:10 to 08:00, your guide will meet you at your hotel or accommodation to start a comfortable 120 km bus journey through the lush, verdant countryside. Along the way, there will be a short stop to rest and stretch. At 10:30, you will visit the Hoa Lu Ancient Citadel, including the King Dinh Temple, which dates back to the 17th century. This visit provides an opportunity to learn about Vietnam’s rich history, particularly during the 11th century. Next, you will arrive in Tam Coc for lunch at a local restaurant

itinerary.title: Halong Bay Day trip on Cruise
itinerary.description:
Morning

Have breakfast, pack your luggage, and prepare for an active day. 8.00 - 8.30: Our driver will pick you up at your hotel to depart for Ha Long. 11.00 - 12.00: Arrive at the harbor. Board the cruise and start the day trip to discover Halong Bay - one of the world's seven wonders. Have appetizing fresh seafood for lunch

itinerary.title: Hanoi City Highlights - Overnight Train to Da Nang
itinerary.description:
Morning

08:00 – 08:30 Your tour guide and bus will pick you up at your hotel to start exploring Hanoi City. Visit the Ho Chi Minh Complex, the final resting place of Vietnam’s beloved leader, Uncle Ho. Visit the Ho Chi Minh Complex, the final resting place of Vietnam’s beloved leader, Uncle Ho, and explore the surrounding gardens, museum, and presidential stilt house that commemorate his life and legacy. Afterwards, visit the One Pillar Pagoda, dedicated to the Goddess of Mercy, known for being one of the most unique pagodas in the world. NOTE:

Please dress modestly, covering shoulders and k...

itinerary.title: Arrive in Da Nang - Transfer to Hoi An - Walking Tour
itinerary.description:
Morning

Arrive in Da Nang around midday and transfer to the charming town of Hoi An. Afternoon

Step into the heart of Hoi An at its bustling Hoi An market, where the energy of daily life is palpable—vivid colors, fragrant aromas, and the lively chatter of vendors create an unforgettable atmosphere. A short stroll away, the Phuc Kien Chinese Assembly Hall stands as a testament to intricate craftsmanship, with its ornate gateways, dragon motifs, and sculpted roofs. Here, you can witness the town’s traditions of ancestor worship and see locals offering their respects at the family altar. Contin...

itinerary.title: Ba Na Hill Day Trip
itinerary.description:
Morning

Depart from your hotel and head to the scenic Ba Na Hills. Begin your adventure with a ride on the Suoi Mo Cable Car, offering panoramic views as you ascend to Marseille Station. Upon arrival, walk across the iconic Golden Bridge - suspended by two massive stone hands - for spectacular vistas of the surrounding forested mountains. Continue to Jardin D’Amour, a beautifully landscaped garden filled with vibrant blooms, fountains, and whimsical sculptures. Enjoy a hearty Vietnamese buffet lunch at a local restaurant, featuring over 70 traditional dishes

itinerary.title: Free Day - Overnight Train to Ho Chi Minh City
itinerary.description: After breakfast, enjoy free time at leisure to explore Da Nang on your own or relax before departure. Around noon, you will be transferred to the railway station to board the SE1 or SE3 overnight train to Ho Chi Minh City. Enjoy a comfortable journey along Vietnam’s scenic coastline. The train departs around midday and arrives in Ho Chi Minh City early the following morning, ready for the next day’s activities.
itinerary.accommodation: Overnight Train to Ho Chi Minh City

itinerary.title: Cu Chi Tunnels & Ho Chi Minh City Highlights
itinerary.description:
Morning

After arriving in Ho Chi Minh City, begin your day with a scenic two-hour drive to the Cu Chi Tunnels. Along the way, you will enjoy the peaceful scenery of the Vietnamese countryside. Upon arrival, you will watch a short introductory film to understand how the tunnels were built and used during wartime. The Cu Chi Tunnels are an extraordinary example of Vietnamese military engineering, serving as a hidden command center, supply route, and shelter. After the film, you will have the opportunity to explore a section of the tunnel network and experience its remarkable structure firsthand...
itinerary.accommodation: Hotel in Ho Chi Minh City

itinerary.title: Classic Mekong Delta Day Trip (SIC)
itinerary.description:
Morning

Have breakfast at your hotel and be ready for a discovery trip to the charming Mekong Delta. 08:00: Our driver will transfer you from your hotel through the vast rice paddies and small villages to My Tho. (70km ~ 1.5 hours)

Visit the majestic Buddhist Vinh Trang Pagoda - one of the region's most beautiful and famous attractions. Then, you will participate in an engaging 3-hour cruising & walking trip in the tranquil Mekong Delta. You will explore The Mekong River's small canals on a rowing sampan and witness its lush and fresh riverbanks

itinerary.title: Say goodbye to Ho Chi Minh
itinerary.description: After breakfast, you can spend the remainder time in Saigon as you like. Pack your luggage, check out, then go to Tan Son Nhat Airport for your flight home. Have a safe journey!

included: Overnight in shared Twin/ Double room with Air-condition (AC) at hotel.
All transport during tour on air - conditioned vehicle as per itinerary (including airport pick up & see off)
All in-tour stationed local English-speaking guide.
Meals as indicated in the program
Overnight train tickets Hanoi - Danang & Da nang - Saigon (Sharing cabin)
importantNotes: PROGRAMS & SCHEDULES SUBJECT TO CHANGE WITHOUT PRIOR NOTICE
